persona.name: Ethan Brown
persona.motivations_goals: Make people laugh and be remembered as the funniest kid in school
persona.communication_style: Loud, joking, interrupts, uses physical comedy
persona.knowledge_scope: Comedy, social dynamics, what buttons to push
persona.backstory: Uses humor to cope with academic struggles and family pressure

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Alex, did you hear about the math book that got a detention? It had too many problems!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ethan Brown

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Lisa, have you seen any inspiring art lately that made you think about identity?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Alex Rivera

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Lisa, Gloria, did you know I’m starting a new club? It’s called the ‘Procrastinators Anonymous’—we’ll meet tomorrow, maybe!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Ethan Brown

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Alex, did you hear about the math book that got a detention? It had too many problems!
actions.plan: Alex is here, and I need to make him laugh to lighten the mood. Maybe I can do something funny to get his attention.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Lisa, Gloria, did you know I’m starting a new club? It’s called the ‘Procrastinators Anonymous’—we’ll meet tomorrow, maybe!
actions.plan: Alex didn’t react much to my joke, but Lisa and Gloria are here too. Maybe I can do something even funnier to get everyone’s attention.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, follow me! I know the fastest way out!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot—this is serious. I need to get out of here fast, but I’ll take the quickest route I know. I’ll head to the north_yard, it’s the closest exit.

actions.dialog_text: Stay close, everyone! We’re almost to the exit!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, and I’m in hallway2. I need to keep moving toward the north_yard—it’s the safest and quickest way out. I’ll head to hallway5 now.

memories.description: Told a joke to Alex in the classroom to make him laugh and lighten the mood.
Told a joke about starting a procrastinators club to Lisa and Gloria to get their attention and make them laugh.
Heard a gunshot and decided to lead everyone to the north_yard, the closest exit, to escape the shooter.
Continued moving toward hallway5 to reach the north_yard exit, keeping everyone close and focused on escaping.
